code:
value Item
  name: String
  price: Int
end

let cart = [
  Item(name: "apple", price: 120),
  Item(name: "bread", price: 300),
  Item(name: "cheese", price: 480),
]

mut subtotal = 0
for item in cart
  subtotal = subtotal + item.price
end

let total = if subtotal >= 500
  subtotal - 100
else
  subtotal
end

println("subtotal=#{subtotal}")
println("total=#{total}")
